hooks.command: [ -f wiki/hot.md ] && printf '%s\n' '<wiki-hot-cache>' && cat wiki/hot.md && printf '%s\n' '</wiki-hot-cache>' || true
[ -f wiki/hot.md ] && printf '%s\n' 'Hook-injected context did not survive compaction. Re-loading wiki/hot.md:' && cat wiki/hot.md || true
[ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Please refresh wiki/hot.md with current session context (Key Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads). Keep under 500 words.' || true
